holdings.infoBox: BEDY is an equity ETF with a total of 62 individual holdings. The top holdings are GS Finance Corp 0% stock at 7.72%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 4.04%, Texas Instruments at 3.90%, UnitedHealth Group at 3.84%, and Applied Materials at 3.42%.

overview.description: The BNY Mellon Enhanced Dividend and Income ETF (BEDY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed US large-cap value stock fund. The funds strategy aims to blend income generation, risk management and fundamental stock selection. BEDY was launched on Dec 8, 2025 and is issued by BNY Mellon.
